import axios from"axios";const baseUrl="/api/users";const getAll=async()=>{const response=await axios.get(baseUrl);return response.data;};const getUser=async id=>{const response=await axios.get("".concat(baseUrl,"/").concat(id));return response.data;};const create=async newUser=>{const response=await axios.post(baseUrl,newUser);return response.data;};const update=async(id,data)=>{const response=await axios.put("".concat(baseUrl,"/").concat(id),data);return response.data;};// eslint-disable-next-line
export default{getAll,getUser,create,update};
